nodes.name: 雉科
nodes.summary: 雉科（Phasianidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联179种鸟类，如Udzungwa forest partridge、銹紅林鷓鴣、冠鷓鴣等179种鸟类。

nodes.name: Black francolin
nodes.summary: Black francolin（Black francolin，学名 Francolinus francolinus），分类上属于鸡形目，并归入雉科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 鸡形目
nodes.summary: 鸡形目（Galliformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联298种鸟类，如眼斑冢雉、Red-billed brushturkey、Black-billed brushturkey等298种鸟类。

nodes.name: 佛罗里达州
nodes.summary: 佛罗里达州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括Black francolin、赤颈鸊鷉、Dark-billed cuckoo等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.target: loc-卡梅伦堂区-路易斯安那州-8a6a6a42
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Douglas|year=1973|journal=Birding|volume=5|pages=195–196|title=Black Francolin|issn=0161-1836|url=http://www.hdouglaspratt.com/journal_articles/Pratt%20'73%20Francolin.pdf|access-date=10 January 2023|via=hdouglasspratt.com}} and Cameron parishes of southwestern Louisiana in 1961. Additional introductions have also occurred in south Florida. Elsewhere, black francolins have been introduced to Guam and the Hawaiian Islands. The birds are found in scrubby habitats with plenty of cultivated crops tall enough to offer shelter and open beneath to provide escape routes and easy travel
